message:
test(oracle): add 6 conformance tests for GROUP BY+JOIN, computed columns, REPLACE/conflict, CTE in DML, subquery JOIN, large dataset

Documents CTE-in-DELETE as known gap (CTE names not resolved in DELETE
WHERE subqueries).  All other queries pass with zero mismatches.
Core: 1711 pass, 0 fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
